name: Grilled Steak with Tasso Maque Choux
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Fresh corn; scraped from cob
recipeInstructions:
1. For the maque choux: In a sauté pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. When the pan is smoking hot, add the tasso and sauté for 30 seconds. Add the corn and continue to sauté until it starts to brown, about 2 minutes.
2. Add the onions and continue sauteing until they start to soften, about 1 minute. Stir in the garlic and season with salt and pepper.
3. Continue sauteing until the onions are translucent, about 1 minute. Stir in the heavy cream, red bell peppers, and green onions. Simmer for about 2 minutes or until the mixture is heated through.
4. For the steak: Rub each steak with olive oil and Essence on both sides. Cook the steaks in a hot sauté pan over medium-high heat for 4 minutes on each side until medium rare.
5. Remove the steaks from the pan and spoon some of the maque choux onto the center of each plate. Place the cooked steaks on top of the sauce.
6. Garnish with fried onion rings, green onions, diced red peppers, and yellow onions.
